title: build_canonical_recension_tree data payload
description: v0.22.0 automated stemma (textual-family-tree) reconstruction from chunk-hash overlap. Single-hop BFS-expand witnesses from a seed tablet, build a pairwise distance matrix via 1 - shared_chunks/max(|HA|,|HB|), then run neighbor-joining (default) or UPGMA to produce a phylogenetic tree in Newick format plus a flat edge list. The watershed v0.22 tool: automates a problem scholars currently solve by hand over weeks per composition.

composition_seed.description: The seed_tablet_id passed in by the caller.

algorithm.description: Which phylogenetic algorithm was applied. NJ is the default (unrooted, no clock assumption); UPGMA is offered for callers who want a rooted ultrametric tree.

witnesses.description: Tablets included in the stemma. Index in this array corresponds to row/column index in distance_matrix and to the leaf labels in tree / tree_edges.

shared_chunks_with_seed.description: Number of chunk-hash entries shared with the seed tablet. Will be |H_seed| for the seed itself.

host_chunks_total.description: Total number of non-singleton chunks for which this tablet is a host (|HA| in the distance formula).

distance_matrix.description: NxN symmetric distance matrix where N = witnesses.length. Diagonal entries are 0. Off-diagonal entries are in [0, 1] where 0 = identical chunk-set and 1 = no shared chunks. Indexing matches witnesses[].

tree.description: Newick-format tree string (terminated by ';'). For neighbor_joining, the tree is unrooted (trifurcation at the final NJ node). For upgma, the tree is rooted with ultrametric branch lengths. Internal nodes are labelled N1, N2, …; leaves carry the tablet_id verbatim. Branch lengths follow the conventional ':<float>' syntax.

tree_edges.description: Flat representation of the same tree as `tree`. Each edge has from/to node IDs (leaves are tablet_ids; internal nodes are 'N1', 'N2', …) and a non-negative branch_length. The number of edges is one fewer than the number of nodes for a rooted tree, or equal to the number of internal-leaf incidences for unrooted.

internal_nodes.description: Count of inferred ancestral (internal) nodes in the tree. For an NJ tree with N leaves this is N-2; for UPGMA it is N-1.

seed_host_chunks.description: |H_seed| — total chunk-hash entries containing the seed.

candidate_witnesses_examined.description: Distinct other tablets that appear in any of the seed's chunks before the min_pairwise_chunks filter.

witnesses_after_filter.description: Candidates surviving the min_pairwise_chunks filter, before the max_witnesses cap.
